TITLE: feat: Image-list folders/groups + annotation-status badges (PRD US-1 remainder)
LABELS: roadmap, type:feat, size:L, phase:B-robustness
---
## Context

The image list already has alphabetical sorting and an annotation-status *filter* combo ("All / Without / With annotations"), but gives no at-a-glance signal of which images are done, and no way to organize a large dataset into groups/folders. This issue adds (1) a per-image status badge (icon derived from `all_annotations` — deliberately **no thumbnails**) and (2) optional named groups per image, persisted in the `.iap`, with a group filter. Both build on the existing filter/sort wiring rather than replacing the widget.

## Current state

- `src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/ui/sidebar.py:351-385` — `build_image_list`: plain `QListWidget` (`window.image_list`, `:373`), wired `itemClicked` + `currentRowChanged` → `switch_image` (`:374-377`), context menu → `window.show_image_context_menu` (`:378-379`); status-filter combo `window.image_filter_combo` (`:361-371`, index order 0=all, 1=without, 2=with — load-bearing).
- `src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/controllers/image_controller.py`:
  - `:93-137` — `sort_image_list`: sorts `all_images` and rebuilds the list together, docstring states the **positional invariant** `all_images[i] ↔ image_list.item(i)`; rebuilds with `blockSignals(True/False)` because `currentRowChanged` is wired to `switch_image`.
  - `:139-171` — `image_has_annotations(image_info)`: true if the image or any of its slices has annotations (incl. the prefix-match fallback for unmaterialized slices).
  - `:173-203` — `apply_image_filter`: hides rows via `setRowHidden` (never removes rows — other code iterates by row index); re-applied after every annotation mutation via the contract documented at `controllers/class_controller.py:101-106` (`update_slice_list_colors` → `apply_image_filter`).
- Row-iteration consumers that read `item(i).text()` as a **file name**: `controllers/dino_controller.py:586-601` (batch review navigation), `controllers/annotation_controller.py:520-521`, `controllers/image_controller.py:199-203`.
- Persistence: `controllers/project_controller.py:440-477` rebuilds each `images_data` entry key-by-key on save (extra keys on `all_images` entries are **dropped** unless explicitly copied); load takes `all_images` wholesale (`:181` — `self.mw.all_images = project_data.get("images", [])`), so extra keys survive load automatically.
- Icon precedent: `controllers/class_controller.py:161-163` builds list icons from a color-filled `QPixmap(16, 16)`.
- Existing tests: `tests/unit/test_image_filter.py` (FakeMainWindow + `ImageController` pattern), `tests/unit/test_image_list_sort.py`, `tests/integration/test_image_filter_wiring.py`.

## Proposed design

**Part 1 — status badges.** New method `ImageController.refresh_image_status_icons()`:
- For each row, look up the `all_images` info by `item(i).text()` (same dict-building idiom as `apply_image_filter:198-200`) and set a small icon: filled dot for `image_has_annotations(info)`, hollow/outline dot otherwise.
- Icons are drawn once per (state, dark_mode) into cached `QIcon`s using `QPainter` on a transparent `QPixmap(12, 12)` — colors defined as two `QColor` constants chosen to read on both themes (e.g. green fill vs. mid-gray outline). Icons are painted pixmaps, not stylesheet colors, so the dark-mode "no hardcoded `background:`/`color:` in `setStyleSheet`" rule is not violated — but pick dot colors that pass on both the light and `soft_dark_stylesheet` backgrounds and rebuild the cache when `window.dark_mode` flips.
- Call it from `apply_image_filter()` (end of the method) so it refreshes exactly where the filter already refreshes (the class_controller contract guarantees this runs after every annotation mutation), and from `sort_image_list` after the rebuild.

Badge meaning (two states, both derived, nothing stored):

| Badge | Condition |
|-------|-----------|
| filled dot | `image_has_annotations(info)` is True (any slice counts for stacks) |
| hollow dot | otherwise |

**Part 2 — groups.**
- Data: optional string key `"group"` on each `all_images` entry. No separate registry; the set of groups is derived (`sorted({info.get("group") for info in all_images if info.get("group")})`). An empty/whitespace group name from the input dialog is treated as "Remove from group".
- Assign: extend the image context menu (`annotator_window.py::show_image_context_menu`, around `:866`) with "Move to group…" (QInputDialog.getItem with existing groups + editable for a new name) and "Remove from group". Both call a new `ImageController.set_image_group(file_name, group_or_None)` → update `all_images` entry → `sort_image_list()` → `auto_save()` (guarded by `is_loading_project`).
- Display: `sort_image_list` sort key becomes `(group.casefold() or "", name.casefold(), name)` so grouped images cluster (ungrouped first); item text stays the bare file name (**no header rows** — see Pitfalls), the group is shown via `setToolTip` and a subtle text like `name  [group]` is explicitly **not** used (text must remain exactly the file name for all `.text()` consumers).
- Filter: new `window.image_group_combo` in `build_image_list` ("All groups" + derived names, repopulated by `sort_image_list` with signals blocked); `apply_image_filter` hides rows failing **either** the status filter or the group filter (compute both, OR the hide flags).
- Persist: in `save_project` add `"group"` to `image_data` when set (`project_controller.py:443-448`); nothing needed on load (`:181` keeps extra keys). Old projects: `info.get("group")` is simply absent → ungrouped.

## Implementation steps

1. Branch `feature/image-list-groups-badges`.
2. Implement icon cache + `refresh_image_status_icons`; hook into `apply_image_filter` and `sort_image_list`.
3. Add `set_image_group` + context-menu entries; keep `show_image_context_menu` delegation thin.
4. Extend `sort_image_list` (sort key, group-combo repopulation with `blockSignals`), keeping the positional invariant and the existing `select_name`/`do_switch` re-selection contract intact.
5. Extend `apply_image_filter` with the group predicate; keep index order 0=all for both combos so the default path stays the cheap unhide pass (`image_controller.py:192-197`).
6. Add `"group"` to the save-side `images_data` build.
7. Dark-mode pass: toggle dark mode, confirm badges and combo render (rebuild icon cache on toggle — hook wherever `window.dark_mode` is applied, e.g. the theme apply path in `ui/theme.py`).
8. Regression sweep on the row-index consumers: run DINO batch review navigation (`dino_controller.py:586-601`) and a COCO import (`tests/integration/test_io_controller_import.py`) against a grouped project.
9. Tests, docs, senior review, PR.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every image row shows a status badge; annotating the current image updates its badge without switching images (via the mutation → `update_slice_list_colors` → `apply_image_filter` chain).
- [ ] Multi-dim images show "annotated" if **any** slice has annotations (delegates to `image_has_annotations`).
- [ ] Images can be assigned to / removed from a named group via the context menu; the list re-sorts with groups clustered; selection is preserved (no spurious `switch_image` — verify no extra image loads occur during re-sort).
- [ ] Group filter and status filter compose (row hidden if either excludes it).
- [ ] Groups survive save → close → reopen (`.iap` roundtrip); projects saved before this feature load unchanged, all images ungrouped.
- [ ] Item `.text()` is still exactly the file name for every row (DINO batch navigation and COCO import reconciliation still work — run `tests/integration/test_io_controller_import.py`).
- [ ] Badges legible in both light and dark mode.
- [ ] Existing filter/sort tests pass unmodified except for fixture additions.

## Test plan

- Extend `tests/unit/test_image_filter.py` (reuse its `FakeMainWindow`/`mw` fixture, adding `image_group_combo`): group filter hides non-members; combined status+group filtering; index 0 of both combos hides nothing.
- Extend `tests/unit/test_image_list_sort.py`: grouped sort clusters by group then name, positional invariant `all_images[i] == item(i).text()` still holds; `set_image_group` triggers exactly zero `switch_image` calls (the fixture already stubs `auto_save`).
- New `tests/unit/test_image_status_icons.py`: after `refresh_image_status_icons`, annotated rows have a non-null `item.icon()` differing (via `QIcon.pixmap(...).toImage()`) from unannotated rows.
- Integration: extend `tests/integration/test_image_filter_wiring.py` — annotate on the real window, assert the badge/state refresh fired; save/reload roundtrip keeps `group` keys.

Run: `pytest tests/unit/test_image_filter.py tests/unit/test_image_list_sort.py tests/unit/test_image_status_icons.py tests/integration/test_image_filter_wiring.py tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`

## Docs to update

- `docs/05_building_block_view.md` — note the new `ImageController` responsibilities (status icons, groups).
- `docs/06_runtime_view.md` — update the image-list workflow (badges refresh path, group assignment).
- `docs/08_crosscutting_concepts.md` — extend the image-list section: the `.text()==file_name` contract, why header rows are forbidden, badge icon-cache pattern.
- `docs/09_architecture_decisions.md` — new ADR (next free ADR number): "Flat grouped image list with derived status badges (no tree widget, no thumbnails)".

## Pitfalls & guardrails

- **No header/separator rows.** `dino_controller.py:586-601`, `annotation_controller.py:520-521`, and `apply_image_filter` all treat `item(i).text()` as a file name; a header row would be interpreted as a phantom image. Grouping is expressed by sort order + tooltip + filter only.
- **Positional invariant**: `all_images[i] ↔ image_list.item(i)` (docstring `image_controller.py:96-98`) is relied on by COCO import reconciliation — sort `all_images` and the widget together, exactly as `sort_image_list` does today.
- **List rebuilds must be signal-blocked** (`blockSignals(True/False)`): `currentRowChanged` → `switch_image`, so an unblocked rebuild fires spurious image switches (CLAUDE.md selection-sync pattern; same reason `setSortingEnabled` is deliberately not used).
- **Filter hides, never removes** rows (`setRowHidden`) — other code iterates by row index; keep the group filter on the same mechanism.
- **Dark mode — no hardcoded colors rule**: never add `background:`/`color:` to widget `setStyleSheet(...)`; hardcoded greys punch bright boxes into the dark sidebar. Badge colors live in painted pixmaps and must be chosen per theme.
- `set_image_group` must respect `is_loading_project` before `auto_save()` (CLAUDE.md critical note).
- Repopulating `image_group_combo` fires `currentIndexChanged` → `apply_image_filter` unless signals are blocked — block, repopulate, restore selection, unblock.

## Dependencies

None

_Workflow: follow CLAUDE.md — feature branch, run smoke tests (`pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`), update arc42 docs, run the senior-reviewer agent before the PR._
